actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) poison damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the toad can't bite another target.

special_abilities.name: Amphibious
special_abilities.description: The toad can breathe air and water

special_abilities.name: Standing Leap
special_abilities.description: The toad's long jump is up to 20 ft. and its high jump is up to 10 ft., with or without a running start.
